condition_notes: Before there was much of anything, there was the wall and the ball. Super Breakout (CXL4006) shipped paddle-in-hand with many an Atari computer — this is that cartridge, loose and honest. Uses paddle controllers. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
